attributes.Lookup Sql Override:
SELECT EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.AMOUNT as AMOUNT,
 EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.BASE_AMOUNT as BASE_AMOUNT, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.CONTROL_AMOUNT as CONTROL_AMOUNT, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.DAILY_AMOUNT as DAILY_AMOUNT, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.GES_DELETE_DATE as GES_DELETE_DATE, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.GES_UPDATE_DATE as GES_UPDATE_DATE, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE as LAST_UPDATE_DATE, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.LINE_SOURCE as LINE_SOURCE, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE as LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.ORG_ID as ORG_ID,
EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.ORIGINAL_AMOUNT as ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.ORIGINAL_BASE_AMOUNT as ORIGINAL_BASE_AMOUNT, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.ORIGINAL_ROUNDING_AMT as ORIGINAL_ROUNDING_AMT, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.PERIOD_NAME as PERIOD_NAME,
EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID as PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.PO_HEADER_ID as PO_HEADER_ID,
EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.PO_LINE_ID as PO_LINE_ID,
EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID as PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID as SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.CREATE_DATETIME as CREATE_DATETIME, EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.GLOBAL_NAME as GLOBAL_NAME, 
EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.INVOICE_ID as INVOICE_ID, 
EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS.LINE_NUMBER as LINE_NUMBER
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_INV_LINES_ALL_DELS
attributes.Lookup condition: GLOBAL_NAME = in_GLOBAL_NAME AND INVOICE_ID = in_INVOICE_ID AND LINE_NUMBER = in_LINE_NUMBER
